title: Okta application assignment state
description: One record per Okta-registered application capturing which groups are entitled to access it. Pulled on a schedule from /api/v1/apps and /api/v1/apps/{id}/groups. The platform evaluator decides pass/fail per (control, assignment) pair; the connector emits descriptive (INCONCLUSIVE) records.

app_id.description: Okta application id (the OKTA assigned UUID-like identifier).

sign_on_mode.description: Okta sign-on mode (SAML_2_0, OPENID_CONNECT, BOOKMARK, SECURE_PASSWORD_STORE, AUTO_LOGIN, etc.).

assigned_group_ids.description: Group ids that are entitled to access the application.

assigned_group_count.description: Cardinality of assigned_group_ids (denormalized for evaluator convenience).
